scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @gsd/server" "npm run dev -w @gsd/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @gsd/shared && npm run build -w @gsd/server && npm run build -w @gsd/web
scripts.build:lambdas: npm run build -w @gsd/shared && npm run build -w @gsd/lambda-interactions -w @gsd/lambda-followup -w @gsd/lambda-update-dns -w @gsd/lambda-watchdog
